name: "Mamere's Doodle"
description: A drawing Mamere left behind during her journey, depicting the rare moment when a pink Frostfin Whale, said to bring good fortune, leaps from the sea.\nAt first glance, it might seem no different from the carefree doodles of the Conch Gang's children. Upon closer inspection... well, they really aren't any different. But to Mamere, this brand-new style (which, notably, eludes even the 103,900 famous styles cataloged by Seymour) is a happy one that her friends can understand. And for that reason alone, it is the most precious and beautiful art style of all. For just as few people will ever glimpse a pink Frostfin Whale, there will always be those who wish to bring good fortune to someone important to them.
